name: OpenEMR PR walkthrough
description: 60-second scripted demo: ask Jarvis to summarise the openemr PR queue, then to flag PRs from sjpadgett. Drives the assistant through a known happy-path without a real microphone. Used by Playwright/Puppeteer for demo capture.

steps.text: What can you do right now?
List the most recent open pull requests on the openemr/openemr repository.
Always flag pull requests from sjpadgett.
